zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Elizabeth Weston於1481年出生在英國素瑞其普斯亞德時，她的父親Thomas Weston39歲，母親Lady Cecilia de Irmingland36歲。她於1501年與Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II在英國英格蘭肯特澤文亞可斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1555年7月在英國肯特設維寧享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特設維寧聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Elizabeth Weston于1481年出生在英国素瑞其普斯亞德时，她的父亲Thomas Weston39岁，母亲Lady Cecilia de Irmingland36岁。她于1501年与Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II在英国英格兰肯特澤文亞可斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1555年7月在英国肯特設維寧享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特設維寧聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Elizabeth Weston was born in 1481, in Chipstead, Surrey, England, her father, Thomas Weston, was 39 and her mother, Lady Cecilia de Irmingland, was 36. She married Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II in 1501, in Sevenoaks, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in July 1555, in Chevening, Kent, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Elizabeth Weston est née en 1481, à Chipstead, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Weston, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecilia de Irmingland, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II en 1501, à Sevenoaks, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1555, à Chevening, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1501 in Sevenoaks, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1555 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Chevening, Kent, England und wurde in St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II nel 1501, nel Sevenoaks, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1555, nel Chevening, Kent, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Saint Botolph's Church, Chevening, Seven: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 처베닝 스트 벗프'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Elizabeth Weston(이)가 1481년 영국 수리 치프스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Weston(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Cecilia de Irmingland(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 세베노크스에서 Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1555년 7월 영국 켄트 처베닝에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 처베닝 스트 벗프'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Elizabeth Weston nasceu em 1481, em Chipstead, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Weston, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecilia de Irmingland, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II em 1501, em Sevenoaks, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em julho de 1555, em Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Elizabeth Weston родилась в 1481 г. в местности чипстид, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Weston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecilia de Irmingland, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II в 1501 г. в местности сивеноакс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла июль 1555 г. в местности чевенинг, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности ст ботолф'с чурч, чевенинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir John Lennard, II, Sheriff of Kent II en 1501, en Sevenoaks, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en julio de 1555, en Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
